raw_segments: The video opens with Huu Trung, clad in a gray striped t-shirt, skillfully manipulating a yellow rubber band between his fingers, creating intricate loops and illusions, all set to an upbeat, electronic dance music track with a strong, driving beat. A new, slower, melodic electronic music track begins, providing a calmer backdrop as he performs a series of quick transformations: a yellow smiley-face balloon appears, then vanishes to reveal a yellow can; next, a green balloon with white patterns appears and transforms into a green can. The scene shifts once more, with Huu Trung now in a blue patterned shirt featuring nautical designs, holding up a King of Spades playing card and pointing to it with his index finger, while the melodic electronic music and female vocals continue to play, building slightly.

Dressed in a blue patterned shirt adorned with nautical designs, he deftly manipulates the card, holding it between his thumb and index finger while gesturing over it. He clearly presents the card to the camera, then covers and reveals it, seemingly unchanged. The scene then shifts to a close-up of the King of Spades on a plain white surface, where a hand uses an orange utility knife to precisely cut a small section from its edge. Following the cut, the card is picked up, flipped to display its blue-backed side, and then returned to its face, remarkably appearing intact. The video cuts back to Huu Trung, who repeats his gestural emphasis over the card, highlighting the illusion of restoration. All these actions unfold against a neutral gray background, while an upbeat, electronic dance music (EDM) track with a driving beat and synth melodies provides a continuous, energetic soundtrack.

raw_segments: The video begins with Huu Trung, wearing a yellow and black t-shirt emblazoned with 'You never walk alone' and a silver metal wristwatch, skillfully performing a precise folding trick with a U.S. dollar bill against a clean white background. Upbeat, electronic music with a driving beat plays continuously throughout the segment. He meticulously folds the bill lengthwise and then horizontally, demonstrating expert hand movements. The backdrop then transitions to a textured gray wall as he continues his manipulation, eventually using blue-handled scissors to cut the U.S. dollar bill vertically into two halves. The scene shifts to Huu Trung, now in a dark blue button-up shirt patterned with pink flamingos and palm trees, standing against a plain white background. He holds an orange pencil in his right hand and a silver ring in his left, executing an illusion where the ring seemingly passes through the pencil. He gestures with his left hand to emphasize the trick before removing the ring, revealing it to be perfectly intact. A close-up then shows his hands demonstrating the secret: a thin black string threaded through the orange pencil and attached to the silver ring, explaining the mechanism behind the illusion. The text 'Huu Trung' remains visible in the top left corner throughout the entire performance, accompanied by the persistent energetic music.

The video opens with a close-up of hands, set against a plain white wall, carefully unwinding black thread from an orange pencil with a black tip, revealing a spool of black thread with wooden ends, all accompanied by upbeat, energetic electronic music. The scene transitions to a medium shot of Huu Trung, identified by the text 'Huu Trung' in the top left corner, wearing a dark blue short-sleeved button-up shirt adorned with pink flamingos and palm trees, and a silver wristwatch on his left hand. He holds the orange pencil and the spool, demonstrating how the thread is wound around the pencil. With precise movements, he uses blue-handled scissors to cut a short length of the black thread, then ties it into a small loop around the pencil. Huu Trung then skillfully manipulates the loop with deliberate hand gestures, making it appear to float or interlock with the pencil, emphasizing the trick's mechanics and highlighting the loop's invisibility and tightness, all while the electronic music continues to provide an energetic backdrop.

event_blocks.summary: Huu Trung, identified by text, initially demonstrates a string trick with an orange pencil and black thread against a white background, accompanied by upbeat electronic music. He then transitions to a white table, wearing a white t-shirt with an abstract design and gray shorts. Holding a blue 'Euté' snack bag and an orange 'Swing' snack bag, he folds and twists them to showcase a sealing method. Separating the bags, he opens the orange 'Swing' bag and pours its orange, ridged contents into a white bowl with a blue floral pattern, briefly displaying a snack piece before placing it back. The scene shifts to a close-up of Huu Trung's hands using an orange utility knife to cut open the orange 'Swing' bag, labeled 'Khoai Tây, Ú Tày', pouring its contents into the same bowl. He then cuts open the blue 'Euté' bag, labeled 'Snack Khoai Tây, Sí Muối', pouring its pale yellow, wavy snacks into the bowl. The knife is placed on the white table, and Huu Trung folds and twists both empty bags. The background music changes to a more melodic electronic track. He holds the blue 'Euté' bag to the camera, pointing out the barcode, QR code, and manufacturer details, including 'CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN LIWAYWAY VIỆT NAM' and 'www.ohshi.com.vn'. He then shows the back of the orange 'Swing' bag, highlighting its nutritional information and barcode. The segment concludes with Huu Trung presenting both empty snack bags, one in each hand, as a female vocal begins to sing "I see the light..." over the music against a white background. Finally, a static white screen displays the text 'THANKS FOR WATCHING LIKE AND SUBSCRIBE' with the ongoing background music.

raw_segments: The video opens with Huu Trung, identified by text in the top left corner, wearing a dark blue short-sleeved button-up shirt with pink flamingo and palm tree patterns. He skillfully performs a string trick with an orange pencil and black thread, demonstrating precise hand movements against a plain white background, all set to a continuous upbeat, electronic background music. The scene then transitions to Huu Trung, now in a white t-shirt with a colorful abstract design and gray shorts, standing behind a white table. He holds a blue 'Euté' snack bag and an orange 'Swing' snack bag, proceeding to fold and twist them together to showcase a sealing method. Still accompanied by the electronic music, he separates the bags, opens the orange 'Swing' bag, and pours its orange-colored contents into a white bowl with a blue floral pattern. He briefly picks up a piece of the snack to display it before placing it back. The segment concludes with a close-up of the two snack bags placed side-by-side on the white surface, as Huu Trung’s hands adjust their positions, with the persistent electronic soundtrack playing throughout.

The video segment opens with a close-up of Huu Trung's hands, wearing a silver wristwatch, as he uses an orange utility knife to cut open an orange 'Swing' snack bag, labeled 'Khoai Tây, Ú Tày'. Throughout these initial actions, an upbeat, energetic electronic music track with a driving beat plays in the background. He then pours the orange, ridged snack pieces into a white ceramic bowl with a blue floral pattern. After setting the first bag aside, he proceeds to cut open a blue 'Euté' snack bag, labeled 'Snack Khoai Tây, Sí Muối', using the same knife, and pours its pale yellow, wavy potato snacks into the same bowl, mixing them with the previous contents. The knife is then placed on the white table. Huu Trung picks up both empty bags, folding and twisting them to demonstrate their flexibility and structure. Around the 0:41 mark, the background music transitions to a different electronic track, which is more melodic and less percussive. He holds the blue 'Euté' bag up close to the camera, pointing to the barcode, QR code, and manufacturer details printed on the back, including 'CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN LIWAYWAY VIỆT NAM' and 'www.ohshi.com.vn'. He then shows the back of the orange 'Swing' bag, highlighting its nutritional information and barcode. The segment concludes with Huu Trung standing behind the white table, now wearing a white t-shirt with a colorful abstract design and gray shorts, holding both empty snack bags, one in each hand, as if presenting them to the viewer. A female vocal begins to sing "I see the light..." over the melodic electronic music as the scene fades, all against a clean, bright white background.

The segment begins with Huu Trung, identified by white text in the top left corner, standing behind a clean white table. He is dressed in a white t-shirt with a colorful abstract design and gray shorts. An upbeat electronic background music track, characterized by a steady beat and synth melodies, plays continuously throughout the scene. Huu Trung holds two snack bags: a blue 'Euté' bag and an orange 'Swing' bag. He proceeds to open the 'Euté' bag first, revealing pale yellow wavy potato snacks, which he then places aside. Next, he opens the 'Swing' bag, containing orange-colored ridged snack pieces, and deliberately pours its contents into a white ceramic bowl adorned with a blue floral pattern. The bright, even lighting highlights the minimalist aesthetic. Following the snack pouring, the video transitions to a static white screen displaying bold black text that reads 'THANKS FOR WATCHING LIKE AND SUBSCRIBE', which remains visible for the remainder of the segment, accompanied by the ongoing background music.
